response:
Subject: Appeal to Unblock Account  

I am writing to appeal on behalf of my account, which was recently blocked due to suspicious payment activity. I did not make any payments that triggered the block, and I am seeking a review of this decision. I am committed to complying with Google's policies and would appreciate the opportunity to provide additional information to resolve this issue. I would be grateful for a prompt response and a resolution to restore my account. Thank you for your attention to this matter.
